title: Hocraft
description: This modpack is designed for a fun multiplayer experience with friends and features a rich variety of content. It combines tech, magic, exploration, and adventure through mods like Create, Mekanism, Cataclysm, TACZ, Vampirism, Deeper and Darker.
body:
---

## 🧭 Description

This modpack was built with **multiplayer in mind** — perfect for connecting with friends and exploring a wide range of content together! It features a carefully selected mix of mods including **Create**, **Mekanism**, **Cataclysm**, **TACZ**, **Vampirism**, **Deeper and Darker**, and **Ad Astra**, offering everything from automation and tech to magic, dungeons, and interdimensional and space exploration.

Although it's focused on being played with others through a server, **you can also play it in single-player** without issues. For the best single-player experience, we recommend disabling:

* `FancyMenu`
* `Drippy Loading Screen`

To host your own server, you can set the desired IP address directly in the game via:

```
Main Menu > Options > Online > Change IP
```

---

## ⚠️ HOSTING A SERVER?

If you're planning to **host a multiplayer server**, make sure to use the **server-optimized version** of the modpack:

🛠️ 👉 [**Download Server Version Here**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hocraft-sv)

> The client version is not designed for server use and may cause compatibility issues.

---

## ✨ Features

This modpack includes a variety of exciting mods that enhance different aspects of gameplay, offering automation, challenging bosses, expanded dimensions, and performance optimization:

* **Create** and **Mekanism** – Advanced automation and power systems
* **Cataclysm** – Intense boss battles and high-level combat
* **Deeper and Darker** – New dimensions full of secrets and challenges
* **Ad Astra** – Space travel and interdimensional exploration
* **Embeddium** – Boosts performance and reduces lag
* **Oculus** – Enables shaders for better visuals and immersion

Alongside these core features, you'll also find mods focused on **decoration**, **exploration**, and **quality of life** improvements. Whether you're optimizing your gameplay, enhancing the look of your world, or venturing into unknown dimensions, there’s something for every type of player.

---

## 🖥️ System Requirements

Tested on:

* **CPU**: AMD Ryzen 5 6600H
* **RAM**: 16GB
* **GPU**: RTX 3050

For smoother performance on lower-end systems, consider using additional optimization mods.

> ⚠️ **Note**: This is a **client-side modpack**. If you're setting up a server, please use the server-side version linked above.
> 🗺️ **Map images** are for illustrative purposes only and are not included in the pack.

---
